package rulecoverage

func NegativeOperationalCommandHandlersReuseHttpServicesWithoutAdapter() string {
    ruleID := "operational_command_handlers_reuse_http_services_without_adapter"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "CLI or cron entrypoints that import Gin-only service contracts instead of neutral application services."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
